field.name: implied_ids
field.eval: [ (4, ref('sales_team.group_sale_salesman')), (4, ref('purchase.group_purchase_user')), (4, ref('stock.group_stock_user')), (4, ref('account.group_account_invoice')), (4, ref('point_of_sale.group_pos_user')), (4, ref('uom.group_uom')), ]

record.field: Records and confirms sales, purchases, returns, expenses and payments. Cannot cancel, delete or access settings.
Users outside this group cannot confirm sales of storable products with insufficient stock in the selected warehouse.

field.name: implied_ids
field.eval: [ (4, ref('group_scalebox_user')), (4, ref('sales_team.group_sale_manager')), (4, ref('purchase.group_purchase_manager')), (4, ref('stock.group_stock_manager')), (4, ref('account.group_account_manager')), (4, ref('point_of_sale.group_pos_manager')), (4, ref('stock.group_stock_multi_locations')), (4, ref('stock.group_stock_multi_warehouses')), (4, ref('stock.group_adv_location')), (4, ref('product.group_product_pricelist')), (4, ref('group_scalebox_negative')), ]

record.field: All user rights, plus: cancel, delete, settings, chart of accounts, journal entries, and main financial reports.
